banner.linkText: Sign up in under a minute →

heroSubtitle: Rolling subs, FR and DH vests, kickoff rotation, conversion equity, the §7 unbroken-period carve-out. Siren knows the Junior Laws that generic sub-timers miss. So you can stop juggling a clipboard and watch your kid play.
metaDescription: Junior rugby league game manager. Forward/Back rotations, vest tracking, kickoff equity, Junior Laws enforced, live tries + conversions.

centerpiece.before: Everything you need to make game day a

finalCtaBody: Free for the entire 2026 season. Works on the phone you already have. No app download, no credit card.

features.body: The rotation engine tracks minutes for all players and nudges you toward balanced playing time, without you having to count.
bullets: Total game time visible at a glance
Optional unbroken-period rule enforced
Season totals carry across all games
features.imageAlt: Rugby league rotation view showing forward and back field-time bars

features.body: Log a try with one tap; the conversion kicker comes from the rotation. Every player kicks before any kicks twice (with a one-tap override for the rare double). Turn scoring off if you're in an age group that does not keep score.
bullets: Tries + conversions for both teams in one tap
Conversion kicker rotation enforced automatically
Tag rugby league (U6/U7): tries tracked, conversions disabled
features.imageAlt: Rugby league score view with tries and a conversion-kicker picker

features.body: At U9 and up, the FR and DH vests rotate every period. Siren tracks who's worn what across the match so no player wears a vest twice and handles the injury-replacement carve-out without breaking the count.
bullets: FR + DH assignment suggested at every period break
No-double-wear rule enforced across the match
Logged across the season so every player gets a go
features.imageAlt: Vest assignment sheet showing FR and DH pickers for the next period

features.body: Mark each player available or unavailable the night before. Short of numbers? Drop the on-field count to match and Siren rebalances rotations + vest assignments automatically.
bullets: One tap to mark a player available or unavailable
Run a smaller squad to match the opposition
Last-minute changes and fill-ins handled on the day
features.imageAlt: Pre-game availability list with available/unavailable chips

features.body: Long-press any player to lock them to forward or back, flag an injury, or lend them to the opposition. Siren adapts mid-game without losing track of the rotation or the vest plan.
bullets: Lock a player to Forward or Back, or always-on
Injured players skip the rotation
Lend a player to the opposition and track their time separately
features.imageAlt: Player actions sheet with lock-to-forward, injury, and lend options

features.body: Big Jimmy's a tackling machine? Little Lenny's a speedster out wide? Add forward / back position chips to start introducing the concept of positions to players. The lineup suggester routes chipped players to their position first, then balances the rest.
bullets: Optional Forward + Back chips seeded automatically on new RL teams
Suggester pools chip-mates by position
Over-ride at any point
features.imageAlt: Player chips with Forward and Back labels and matching position-coloured dots

title.before: Walk into the second half with a

features.body: At half-time, Siren suggests a reshuffle that balances forward/back time, settles the unbroken-period count, and rotates the FR/DH vests. One tap to accept, or rearrange manually.
bullets: Suggested H2 lineup based on time equity + vest rotation
One tap to accept or drag to customise
Unbroken-period counter updates as you swap players
features.imageAlt: Half-time break screen with suggested reshuffle and field-time bars

title.before: Hand scoring to any parent in

features.body: Send the run-link to a parent on the sideline and they become the scorer for the day. No app download, no account, no setup. A magic link gets them straight in.
bullets: Full scoring access via a single shareable link
No app download or account needed
Coach stays focused on the field
features.imageAlt: Public run-link scoring view for parents

features.body: Did you know that the junior rules dictate that every player must play an unbroken half or quarter regardless of how many players you have on the bench? Neither did we. Abide by the official rules or have flexibility to run your squad the way you want.
bullets: Optional unbroken half rule
Track Kickoffs and Conversions to ensure fair rotation
Apply FR/DH vests according to the rule book
features.imageAlt: Kickoff rotation panel showing per-player count and the next kicker

features.body: After every game, field-time and vest-wear stats update automatically. Spot who hasn't had a chance with a vest and fix it before next round.
bullets: Forward / Back equity across the whole squad
Per-player vest-wear count (FR + DH)
Top try-scorer leaderboard
features.imageAlt: Season stats dashboard with forward/back equity and try-scorer leaderboard

finalCtaTitle.before: Set up your team in about

heroTitle.before: Run the half. Keep your head up.

heroTrust: FREE 2026 SEASON · WORKS ON ANY PHONE · NO APP TO INSTALL
